messages.content: tell me the projects nikos has

**Answer**
Nikos has the following projects:

* Lane Detection & Drivable Area Segmentation
	+ Implemented YOLOP for joint lane detection and drivable area segmentation on real-world images
	+ Compared classical CV and deep learning approaches for lane detection in driving scenarios
* Distributed Deep Learning Framework
	+ Designed a peer-to-peer distributed training platform from scratch with Ring-AllReduce gradient synchronization
	+ Integrated mixed-precision (FP16/FP32) training and GPU acceleration for efficient computation
* Galaxy Morphology Classification
	+ Built a 5-class galaxy morphology classifier for the Galaxy Zoo Challenge using transfer learning on a fine-tuned ResNet-50
* RPC Framework
	+ Built an RPC client-server system over UDP with at-most-once semantics and heartbeat-based failure detection
* myThreads
	+ Developed a user-level threading library with preemptive round-robin scheduling and coroutines via ucontext

**Sources**
[2] Source: 60825178_Nikolaos_Kalamaris_CV_QUBBER.pdf, Page 1
[4] Source: 60825178_Nikolaos_Kalamaris_CV_QUBBER.pdf, Page 1
tell me about the 2nd one more

**Answer**
The 2nd project is a **Distributed Deep Learning Framework**.

**Details**

* Designed a peer-to-peer distributed training platform from scratch with Ring-AllReduce gradient synchronization
* Integrated mixed-precision (FP16/FP32) training and GPU acceleration for efficient computation
